title: Abuse report triage update
body: Weve completed a pass on the latest high-severity abuse reports. One account (spam_wave_42) has been permanently banned for high-volume phishing spam across multiple channels. Another member (toxic_runner) has received a formal warning for targeted harassment of newcomers, with further violations to result in suspension or removal. Reports against core project maintainers that appear to stem from disagreement with moderation decisions have been reviewed and closed as false positive/brigading. As always, please continue to report spam, harassment, or other behavior that makes the space less safe  it helps us keep the community healthy.
